title: 江苏不同城市 GDP 排位赛
summary: 从 1978 年改革开放到 2024 年，看江苏 13 市经济排位如何被产业变迁和区域政策改写。
summaryEn: From 1978 to 2024, how Jiangsu's 13 cities reshuffled their economic rankings through industrialization and regional policy.
sourceLabel: 江苏省各市历年统计公报及国民经济核算，单位：当年价格
sourceLabelEn: Jiangsu Statistical Yearbooks and prefecture-level statistical communiqués, current prices
sourceNote: 本数据为展示用估算序列，基于江苏省历年统计年鉴及各市统计公报口径整理。1978-1990 年部分数据为合理趋势估计，正式发布前建议使用逐年原始数据。
sourceNoteEn: This dataset is estimated for demonstration purposes based on Jiangsu Statistical Yearbooks. Pre-1990 values are trend estimates.

events.title: 改革开放启动
events.description: 改革开放启动，江苏乡镇工业开始萌芽。
events.descriptionEn: Reform and Opening Up begins, Jiangsu's township industries start emerging.

events.title: 中新苏州工业园奠基
events.description: 中国与新加坡合作开发苏州工业园，苏州进入高速增长轨道。
events.descriptionEn: The China-Singapore Suzhou Industrial Park is established.

events.title: 泰州从扬州分出
events.description: 泰州升格为地级市，扬州泰州分设。
events.descriptionEn: Taizhou is upgraded to prefecture-level city, splitting from Yangzhou.

events.title: 宿迁升格为地级市
events.description: 宿迁从淮阴分出，成为江苏最年轻的地级市。
events.descriptionEn: Suqian becomes the youngest prefecture-level city in Jiangsu.

events.title: 苏通大桥通车
events.description: 苏通长江大桥建成，南通加速融入上海经济圈。
events.descriptionEn: Sutong Bridge opens, connecting Nantong to the Shanghai economic circle.

events.title: 苏州GDP突破万亿
events.description: 苏州成为江苏首个GDP破万亿城市。
events.descriptionEn: Suzhou becomes the first Jiangsu city to exceed 1 trillion yuan GDP.

events.title: 无锡GDP突破万亿
events.description: 无锡成为江苏第三个万亿城市。
events.descriptionEn: Wuxi becomes the third trillion-yuan city in Jiangsu.

events.title: 南通GDP突破万亿
events.description: 南通成为江苏第四个万亿城市。
events.descriptionEn: Nantong becomes the fourth trillion-yuan city in Jiangsu.

events.title: 常州GDP突破万亿
events.description: 常州成为江苏第五个万亿城市。
events.descriptionEn: Changzhou becomes the fifth trillion-yuan city in Jiangsu.
